headline: MARKET WRAP — May 13
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — May 13, 2026 Today's session highlighted sector-specific rotation rather than broad risk themes, with copper and healthcare advancing while uranium faced heavy selling. The contrast between crypto fund outflows and continued altcoin strength suggests underlying institutional caution despite retail momentum. Tomorrow's setup favors watching for continuation in defensive healthcare rotation versus any rebound in beaten-down uranium names. CLOSING PRICES SPY +0.4% | QQQ +0.2% | VIX -0.7% | TLT -0.9% | DXY +0.2% | OIL -1.3% vs MORNING SPY +0.3% | QQQ +0.8% | VIX +1.5% | TLT +0.4% | DXY -0.2% | OIL -4.6% EVENING NEWS ▲ Malaysia: Manageable subsidy costs and resilient funding – BNP Paribas ▲ Forex Today: Hot US inflation data lifts US Dollar as markets brace for Retail Sales and UK GDP ▲ Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed chair amid pressure over rates and Fed independence ▲ ECB’s Lagarde Sees Make-or-Break Moment to Reform European Union ▲ Coinbase CEO Unpacks The Crypto Bill’s Biggest Promise For The US Financial System SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↓ Goldilocks · ↑ Stagflation · ↑ Hegemony · ↑ Displacement REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 39.5/100 (Low). Regime: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: COPX +4.9%, XLV +2.6%, XLP +1.6%, XLU -1.0%, URA -6.8%.
